docs.title: deva's hideout
docs.text:
Tip

It's essential to have some sort of Adblock when surfing the internet. Otherwise you meet the risks of malicious popups or ads.

Warning

While the contents of this site are checked to be safe at the time of uploading, please verify yourself that what you are downloading is the legitimate resource and has not been tampered with in any way, always be vigilant.

If a resource no longer exists, or is malicous / adware, please let tokaua know ASAP!

want to become a contributor? visit contributing.

this site is not affiliated with GeoExe

docs.title: Ad Blocking
docs.text:
An adblock is a piece of software that blocks adveristments and intrusive elements.

uBlock Origin (1) More than just an Ad blocker, blocks trackers, coin miners, popups, annoying anti-blockers, malware sites, etc.

  1. uBlockOrigin & uBlacklist Huge AI Blocklist A huge blocklist of manually curated sites (1000+) that contain AI generated content, for the purposes of cleaning image search engines.

    IP-Logger Filter Filter any site/subsite who's only purpose is to log your IP.

    Multi-Purpose Blocklist Prevents your devices from connecting to unwanted or harmful domains.

    Filterlists Collection of blocklists

uBlacklist Blocks specific sites from appearing in Google search results.

SponsorBlock Allows you to skip annoying self-promos, non-music segments on music videos, intros, and much more on YouTube.

docs.title: DNS
docs.text:
AdGuard Blocks ads, controls access to dangerous sites, speeds up page loading, and protects children from inappropriate content.

NextDNS Blocks ads and trackers on websites and in apps and provides a safe and supervised Internet for kids.

Mullvad DNS You can use this service even if you are not a Mullvad customer.

Cloudflare Fast and private way to browse the Internet.

docs.title: Encryption
docs.text: Encryption is the process of transforming information in a way that, ideally, only authorized parties can decode.

docs.title: VPNs
docs.text:
A VPN (virtual private network), creates a tunnel between your device and a server over the internet in order to hide your IP address and gain unrestricted access to global content, block annoying ads, and encrypt your traffic.

Mullvad VPN (1) Cryptocurrencies are discounted at 10% due to lower fees, can use an account on up to 5 devices, does not support port forwarding.

  1. Pricing: 1 month ~ $5.89Payment Methods: Bitcoin, Bitcoin Cash, Monero, Bank Wire, Credit Card, PayPal, Swish, Eps Transfer, Bancontact, iDEAL, Wero, Przelewy24

Proton VPN (1) FREE tier

  1. Pricing: 1 month ~ $9.99Payment Methods: Credit Card, PayPal, Google Pay

Mysterium Dark (1) Pay-As-You-Go, Residental servers.

  1. Pricing: ~ $3.99 = 200 GiB, $5.49 = 300 GiB, $9.49 = 567 GiBPayment Methods: Crypto, Credit Card

Cloudflare WARP (1.1.1.1) FREE

docs.title: Extensions
docs.text:
Useful extensions for Chromium & Firefox based browsers.

BetterTTV Adds extra emotes and makes the overall chat experience for Twitch much better.

Imagus Enlarge thumbnails, and show images/videos from links with a mouse hover. (Highly Customizable)

Truffle Makes the Youtube Live chatting experience much better with custom emotes and improved UI.

Allow Right-Click Toggle to stop websites from disabling right-clicks.

Dark Reader Dark mode for every website with customization.

Don't F*** With Paste Toggle to stop websites from disabling pasting.

User-Agent Switcher and Manager Allows you to spoof your web-browser.

Volume Master Allows you to change the volume of tabs on browsers.

SponsorBlock Allows you to skip annoying self-promos, non-music segments on music videos, intros, and much more... for YouTube videos.

DeArrow Removes clickbait looking like titles and thumbnails from YouTube videos.

Shazam Attempt to find music playing in media / a specific tab.

Control Panel for Twitter Gives you more control over Twitter and adds missing features and UI improvements.

uBlacklist Blocks sites you specify from appearing in Google search results.

Indie Wiki Buddy Fandom / Fextralife Redirector

docs.title: Scripts
docs.text:
a collection of useful scripts for various tasks.

Chris Titus Tech's Windows Utility Install Programs, Tweaks, Fixes, and Updates.

Clone entire GitHub profile / Organization 

gh repo list ORGNAMEHERE --limit 4000 | while read -r repo _; do
  gh repo clone "$repo" "$repo"
done

WinMasterBlocker Block All Adobe connections via Firewall.

docs.title: Tools
docs.text:
a collection of useful tools for various tasks.

Microsoft PowerToys Collection of utilities that help you customize Windows.

Everything Locate files and folders by name instantly.

Windhawk Customize Windows programs with scripts by the community.

Pinta Pinta is a GTK clone of Paint.Net 3.0, with support for Linux, Windows, and macOS.

Krita Krita is a professional FREE and open source painting program. It is made by artists that want to see affordable art tools for everyone.

QBitTorrent Open-source software alternative to µTorrent.

Bulk Crap Uninstaller Remove large amounts of unwanted applications quickly and clean up leftovers.

BleachBit Free cache, delete cookies, clear Internet history, shred temporary files, delete logs, and discard junk.

Microsoft Process Monitor An advanced monitoring tool for Windows that shows real-time file system, Registry and process/thread activity.

Microsoft Process Explorer Shows you information about which handles and DLLs processes have opened or loaded.

HandBrake Open-source video transcoder.

yt-dlp A feature-rich command-line audio/video downloader for many sites.

Ruffle An open source Flash Player emulator.

VxKex Run Windows 8, 8.1 and 10-exclusive apps on Windows 7

Wine Run Windows applications on UNIX based systems.

docs.title: Fortnite
docs.text:
FortniteEndpointsDocumentation Unofficial API Documentation for official Fortnite & Epic Games services.

Project Reboot 3.0 Project Reboot is an open source game server for Fortnite, featuring support for versions between Season 3 and Season 15, and partial support for other versions.

Erbium Erbium is an open source WIP universal game server for Fortnite, featuring support for versions 3.40 to 19.40, with partial support for Chapter 3+ seasons.

Nova Nova was the core game server for Project Nova, a Fortnite private server developed between 2022 and 2025.

Nova Matchmaker The matchmaker for Project Nova, a Fortnite private server developed between 2022 and 2025.

Nova Client The client DLL for Project Nova, a Fortnite private server developed between 2022 and 2025.

Reboot Launcher Reboot Launcher is a GUI and CLI Launcher made for the Reboot Project, but can be used with any valid client and server DLLs.

LawinServerV1 LawinServer is a local singleplayer lobby server emulator for Fortnite, supporting Battle Royale and Save the World.

LawinServerV2 LawinServer V2 is a Fortnite backend written in Node.js that features an account system and XMPP for certain seasons. Only supports Battle Royale.

Cobalt Cobalt is a Universal SSL Bypass for Fortnite.

Tellurium Tellurium is a universal redirect/SSL bypass for native UE HTTP games. Originally designed for Fortnite.

Sinum Sinum is used to redirect requests from a target URL, such as ol.epicgames.com, to another server, like api.novafn.dev. Supports Android, iOS, Windows, and Xbox.

docs.title: VALVE
docs.text:
SteamID Steam profile lookup with history

Remove Featured Badge on profile (1)

    1. Edit Profile
    2. Featured Badge
    3. Paste in Console
    4. Save

var access_token =  $J("[data-loyaltystore]").data("loyaltystore").webapi_token;
var badgeid = 0;

SetFavoriteFeaturedBadge(access_token, badgeid);

function SetFavoriteFeaturedBadge(access_token, badgeid) {
    $J.post( 'https://api.steampowered.com/IPlayerService/SetFavoriteBadge/v1?', {
        access_token: access_token,
        badgeid: badgeid
    });
}
